title: The Train to York
synopsis: A boy takes the train to York and watches the countryside change outside his window.
sentences: Ben loved train stations because they always felt full of possibility.
One Friday morning, he and his aunt caught a train to York.
They found seats by the window and placed their bags on the rack above.
As the train left the city, rows of houses gave way to fields and stone walls.
Ben watched sheep standing in green grass under a wide sky.
Sometimes the train rushed through tunnels, and the window turned black for a moment.
His aunt showed him the ticket and explained which platform they would need on the way back.
A man came by with tea, coffee, and snacks on a small trolley.
Ben chose orange juice and a packet of crisps.
When they finally arrived, York station felt grand and busy.
Ben stepped onto the platform with a feeling that the adventure was only beginning.
He could not wait to explore the old streets beyond the station.
